testCases.title: Verify navigation to Lessons page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/lessons/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to FAQ page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/faq/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to Login page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/login/'

testCases.title: Verify team search functionality
steps: Verification: Expect the page to display search results for 'Toronto Maple Leafs'
expected: Search results for 'Toronto Maple Leafs' are displayed

testCases.title: Verify pagination functionality
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=9'
expected: Page 9 of hockey teams loads successfully

testCases.title: Verify number of records per page can be changed
steps: Verification: Expect the drop down of the records to open
Verification: Expect the number of records displayed per page to change to '100'
expected: Number of records changed to 100 records per page
